summary: Wayn's join request accepted; Proving Honor activated; Vilkas trial offered; initialize relevant clocks; record first impressions.

Set quest_state.companions.status=active, quest_state.companions.current=companions_proving_honor; add companions:companions_proving_honor to active_quests.

Set current_scene_id=A1-S3_Jorrvaskr_YardTrial, current_location=Whiterun — Jorrvaskr (Harbinger Door -> Training Yard), current_objective=Survive Vilkas's trial and accept the first steps of Proving Honor.
